summary: Aggregate critical payment_events rows in a lookback window
description: Operator-facing read of the payment_events_critical view, aggregated by event_type and severity. Returns a severity-ranked list with occurrence counts and sample error messages so external schedulers (GitHub Actions, Datadog, PagerDuty) can poll for open incidents. Service-role bearer OR rotating x-monitor-token required; not a user surface.

parameters.name: window_minutes
parameters.description: Lookback window in minutes. Default 15, min 1, max 10080 (7 days). Non-integer or NaN values fall back to the default.

200.description: Aggregated events, sorted by severity (critical first) then last_seen DESC. `highest_severity` is the max across the window, `total_count` is the sum of `occurrence_count`.

401.description: Missing or wrong Authorization bearer AND missing or wrong x-monitor-token header

405.description: Method other than GET, POST, or OPTIONS

500.description: Database error or unexpected throw. Response body is always a generic string — internal error details never leak to the client.
